titleStmt.title: SII 24.238: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 238. (A.R. No. 98-A of 1937-38.) WEST WALL OF THE FOURTH PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Records the sale-deed of the lands mentioned in No. 235 on the 23rd of Vaikāśi in the same year i.e., on May 17, 1316 A.D., a month later than the date quoted in No. 235 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī kulaśekharadevarkku yāṇṭu 2 varuṣam Iraṇṭāvatu Etirāmāṇṭu vaikāci mātam Irupattu muṉṟāntiyati nāḷ tiruvaraṅkan tiruppati śrī vaiṣṇavarkaḷil śrī vaikuntadāsaṉum tirumaṅkai nampiyum tirunaṟaiyūr dāsaṉum dāsanampimāril kulaśekharadāsaṉum paccaivāraṇadāsan ciṅkarum Aruḷāḷarum Ivvaṉaivom koyilakaram śrīkodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭa kaḷukku krayadravyaccela
vu kaiyyiṭu kuṭutta paricāvatu tirukkuṟaippaṟṟu vaṭavoḻukil Ivarkaḷukku viṟṟuk kuṭutta Ittiruṉantavaṉam kol 6 10 Ittiruṉantavaṉam kol Aṟupatukkum pramāṇappaṭi mūllyamāṉa U 1000 2 100 6 10 Ippaṇam Āyirattu Irunūṟṟu Aṟupatum koṇṭeṉ koṇṭapaṭi koyiṟkaṭaiyil Āriyabhaṭṭarkaḷil pariñcu kāppār kāṭci Āka An=tarda(da)śākattukkuḷḷe Oru kiḻippaṭak kaikkoṇṭu krayadravyaccelavu kaiyyiṭu kuṭuttom kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷukku Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta kirāmanampi �y Ivar perāl Uttamanampi Iṭṭa terippiṉ paṭikku śrī vaikuntadāsan viṟṟa tiruṉantavaṉam kol 10 1- m kulaśekharadāsan tiru
ṉantavaṉam kol 10 1- m ciṅkar tiruṉantavaṉam kol 10 2(1/4)- m Itaṉ kiḻakku Aruḷāḷar tiruṉantavaṉam kol 8- m Itaṉ kiḻakku tirumaṅkai nampi tiruṉantavaṉam kol 7- m Itaṉ kiḻakku tirunaṟaiyūr dāsan tiruṉantavaṉam kol 10nta- m Ākat tiruṉantavaṉam kol 6 10 Ittiruṉantavaṉam kol Aṟupatum Ippaṇam Āyirattu Irunūṟṟu Aṟupatukkum viṟṟukkuṭuttom śrī vaikuntadāsaṉum tirunaṟaiyūr dāsaṉum tirumaṅkai nampiyum dāsanampimāril kulaśekharadāsaṉum paccai vāraṇa dāsanciṅkarum Aruḷāḷarum Ivvaṉaivom Ippaṭikku Ivai śrī vaikunta dāsan Eḻuttu § Ivai tirumaṅkainampi Eḻuttu § Ivarkaḷ colla Ikrayadravyaccelavu kai(yi)yiṭu Eḻutinamaikku
Ivai Eṭuttakai Aḻakiyanāyaṉār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirunaṟaiyūr dāsan Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai paccaivāraṇa dāsan ciṅkar Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai Aruḷāḷaṉ samjñaiyāṉamaikku Ivai ciṅkar Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai kulaśekharadāsan samjñaiyāṉamaikku Ivai Āṇṭa piḷḷai Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 24.238 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
